transcript: The hot girl fainted on the bed. The man took a cautious sniff and then lifted his head. His face was inexplicably transformed into a hard, shell-like substance. He bent down, aiming at the woman's face. The gallbladder on his cheek slowly pulsated as if it were absorbing something. A day later, the man woke up her. She had no sensation of anything that had happened, and there were no wounds on her face. When the girl returned home, she discovered a small wrinkle on her face. She opened a cabinet, intending to apply some cream, but in that instant, her face aged by several decades. The girl was terrified and rushed back to her room to call her best friend. She realized her arm was rapidly aging too. She touched her mouth with her hand. A front tooth fell out. Terrified, she threw away the tooth, took a few steps, only collapsing on the ground. She struggled to crawl toward her phone, but this short distance became her final despair.
